mapper.insert: /* Review.insertReview */ INSERT INTO TB_REVIEW ( SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, ORDER_ITEM_ID, PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_DET_ID, RATING, CONTENT, FILE_ID, MY_FIT, MY_WEIGHT, MY_HEIGHT, IS_BLINDED, DEL_YN, REVIEW_DATE, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{socialAccountId}, #{orderItemId}, #{productId}, #{productDetId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{fileId}, #{myFit}, #{myWeight}, #{myHeight}, 'N', 'N', CURRENT_DATE, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: /* Review.selectReviewById */ SELECT ID AS id, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, ORDER_ITEM_ID AS orderItemId, PRODUCT_ID AS productId, PRODUCT_DET_ID AS productDetId, RATING AS rating, CONTENT AS content, FILE_ID AS fileId, MY_FIT AS myFit, MY_WEIGHT AS myWeight, MY_HEIGHT AS myHeight, IS_BLINDED AS isBlinded, DEL_YN AS delYn, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* Review.selectReviewByOrderItemId */ SELECT ID AS id, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, ORDER_ITEM_ID AS orderItemId, PRODUCT_ID AS productId, PRODUCT_DET_ID AS productDetId, RATING AS rating, CONTENT AS content, FILE_ID AS fileId, MY_FIT AS myFit, MY_WEIGHT AS myWeight, MY_HEIGHT AS myHeight, IS_BLINDED AS isBlinded, DEL_YN AS delYn, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE ORDER_ITEM_ID = #{orderItemId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* Review.selectReviewsByProductId */ SELECT ID AS id, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, RATING AS rating, CONTENT AS content, FILE_ID AS fileId, CRE_TM AS creTm FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND IS_BLINDED = 'N' ORDER BY ID DESC

/* Review.selectProductReviewSummary */ SELECT #{productId} AS productId, ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(*) AS reviewCount FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND IS_BLINDED = 'N'

/* Review.selectMyReviews */ SELECT R.ID AS id, R.ORDER_ITEM_ID AS orderItemId, R.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, OI.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, R.RATING AS rating, R.CONTENT AS content, R.FILE_ID AS fileId, R.MY_FIT AS myFit, R.MY_WEIGHT AS myWeight, R.MY_HEIGHT AS myHeight, R.CRE_TM AS creTm FROM TB_REVIEW R JOIN TB_ORDER_ITEM OI ON OI.ID = R.ORDER_ITEM_ID WHERE R.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId} AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY R.ID DESC
mapper.update: /* Review.updateReview */ UPDATE TB_REVIEW SET RATING = #{rating}, CONTENT = #{content}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, MY_FIT = #{myFit}, MY_WEIGHT = #{myWeight}, MY_HEIGHT = #{myHeight}, UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id} AND SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
